title: MacOS Booster
description: This Modpack is aimed at boosting the performance of MacOS devices up to at least 120. But if you are not on MacOS then this is just a quality of life modpack.
body:
# What is this Pack?
This Modpack is aimed at boosting the performance of MacOS devices up to at least 120. But if you are not on MacOS then this is just a quality of life modpack.
